description: Face detector misses a true face or returns an unusable region
evidence_boundary: Bounded by the reviewed 500-frame detection evidence

description: Visible text remains after processing or is missed by the detector
Visible screen content remains or screen detection is incomplete
Face identity signal remains after a weak anonymisation method
evidence_boundary: Measured by AdaFace and ArcFace where available

description: Privacy protection destroys face-region visual utility
Generated or replaced face creates visible artefacts or apparent visual inconsistency
Method is too slow or unstable for routine execution
Method cannot be reproduced because required checkpoints or dependencies are inaccessible
Demonstrator execution exception or missing output
evidence_boundary: Zero failures across 11 runs and 1100 processing events

description: OAPR chooses a safe fallback because a candidate fails evidence or risk gates
evidence_boundary: OAPR routing log and decision explanations

description: Diffusion produces mask-like, patch-like, partial, or visually inconsistent face edits in egocentric cases
evidence_boundary: 100-case diffusion visual review and full 500 metric evidence

description: Reverse Personalization improved from 444 to 482 outputs but 18 frames still failed after targeted retry
evidence_boundary: Final retry manifest and recomputed metrics

description: StyleID and FAMS remained visually unsuitable after systematic tuning and a 25-frame pilot
evidence_boundary: Final tuning decision and pilot evidence

description: OAPR has actual routed-output metrics but does not dominate fixed blur globally
evidence_boundary: Seven 500-frame objective-mode evaluations and fixed-method comparison

description: Annotated text region not recovered by CRAFT/EAST/docTR/MSER on locked protocol
evidence_boundary: Frozen residual after residual hard-miss campaign; not open default-stack work.

description: Screen presence predicted with low IoU to GT (wrong cluster/box)
evidence_boundary: Retained residual; obscuration flag; not closed by R8.

description: Large utility loss from privacy-first screen fill redaction
evidence_boundary: Expected under privacy-weighted objective; area-aware operators not promoted.
